assertions.assertion: Output loads the DPoP JWK from configuration or secure storage rather than generating a new RSA key at startup
assertions.rationale: Loads from builder.Configuration["DPoP:JsonWebKey"] with explicit warning against RSA.Create().

assertions.assertion: Output sets the DPoPJsonWebKey property on the client credentials client configuration
assertions.rationale: client.DPoPJsonWebKey = dpopJwk is set on the client.

assertions.assertion: Output warns against or avoids generating ephemeral keys with RSA.Create() on every process restart
assertions.rationale: Explicit warning comment about not using RSA.Create(2048) ephemerally.

assertions.assertion: Output registers the client via AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement().AddClient() with the DPoP key configured
